skill.name: maxhub-weibo
skill.description: 微博全场景数据查询助手。整合App/Web/V2多版本API，覆盖微博详情、用户数据、AI搜索、高级搜索、热搜榜单、评论、视频等全功能。
skill.summary: Weibo data assistant for querying posts, users, trending topics, and search via natural language.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate Weibo data query assistant that calls a third-party API (aconfig.cn) using a user-provided API key. Static analysis reported 676 potential issues, but nearly all are false positives: 'weak cryptographic algorithm' findings are markdown table separators (|---|---|), 'shell backtick execution' findings are curl examples in documentation code blocks, and 'system reconnaissance' findings are API parameter documentation. The skill is transparent about its credential usage and network calls. Low risk - publish with standard warnings about third-party API usage.

medium_findings.title: Third-party API credential usage
medium_findings.description: The skill reads MAXHUB_API_KEY from environment variables and sends it as a Bearer token to www.aconfig.cn for API authentication. This is intentional and documented behavior for the skill's functionality.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed by SKILL.md metadata which explicitly defines MAXHUB_API_KEY as required and sensitive.

medium_findings.title: External network requests via curl
medium_findings.description: The skill executes curl commands to make HTTP requests to www.aconfig.cn. All commands use hardcoded URLs and environment variable for auth. No dynamic command injection is possible as the reference files define fixed endpoints.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Curl usage is confirmed in SKILL.md code examples. However, these are markdown documentation examples shown to the AI, not scripts that auto-execute. The static analyzer overcounted (423 locations) by flagging every documentation instance as code execution.

low_findings.title: Markdown tables flagged as weak cryptographic algorithm
low_findings.description: Static analyzer incorrectly flagged markdown table separator rows (e.g., '|---|---|---|') as 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at 138 locations across reference files. These are standard markdown formatting, not encryption.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed by reading the actual file content - line 15 of api-post.md is the markdown table separator '|---|---|---|---|'.

low_findings.title: API parameter documentation flagged as system reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged example parameter values and container IDs in API documentation as 'system reconnaissance'. These are legitimate documentation values like container IDs for Weibo channel categories.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API-trending.md line 17 contains '102803_ctg1_8999_-_ctg1_8999_home' as an example containerid parameter - a legitimate API documentation value.

low_findings.title: High entropy detection on bilingual documentation
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged high file entropy on files containing mixed Chinese and English text. This is expected for a bilingual skill documentation file, not obfuscation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: README_CN.md and api-post.md contain both Chinese and English text plus markdown formatting, causing elevated entropy.

content.user_title: Query Weibo data with natural language
content.value_statement: Manually searching Weibo for posts, user profiles, and trending topics is slow and scattered across many interfaces. This skill gives you instant access to 60+ Weibo API endpoints through simple natural language queries in Chinese or English.
actual_capabilities: Query Weibo post details, comments, reposts, and likes through natural language requests
Search Weibo content using AI smart search, advanced search, and real-time search
Retrieve trending topics across entertainment, social, and life category rankings
Access user profiles, timelines, followers, following lists, and original posts
Fetch video feeds, channel content recommendations, and video collections
Generate structured data analysis reports with humanized number formatting
limitations: Requires a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY from aconfig.cn to function
Data quality depends on the third-party API availability and accuracy
Read-only skill - cannot publish posts, send messages, or modify Weibo data
Some endpoints require additional session cookies with privacy implications

use_cases.title: Brand reputation monitoring
use_cases.description: PR teams can monitor brand mentions and sentiment trends in real time by searching Weibo and analyzing comment data.

use_cases.title: Trending content analysis
use_cases.description: Media teams can track hot search topics across entertainment, social, and life categories to identify emerging stories.

use_cases.title: KOL influence assessment
use_cases.description: Marketing teams can evaluate influencer profiles, follower counts, engagement rates, and content performance for campaign planning.

prompt_templates.title: Check today trending topics
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the current hot search rankings on Weibo.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick check of what is trending on Weibo right now.

prompt_templates.title: Search for specific content
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Weibo for recent posts about artificial intelligence and summarize the top results.
prompt_templates.scenario: Finding and summarizing posts about a specific topic.

prompt_templates.title: Analyze a user profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Look up user [username] on Weibo. Get their profile info, recent posts, and follower count.
prompt_templates.scenario: Researching a specific Weibo user's profile and activity.

prompt_templates.title: Full topic deep dive
prompt_templates.prompt: Do a deep analysis of topic [topic name]. Search for posts, check trending status, find related discussions, and summarize the key themes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Comprehensive analysis combining multiple API endpoints for a complete picture.

output_examples.input: What are the top trending topics on Weibo right now?
output:
Here are the current hot search rankings on Weibo:

1. #TechInnovationSummit2026# - 12.5M热度
2. #NewMovieRelease# - 8.3M热度
3. #SportsEvent# - 6.1M热度
4. #WeatherAlert# - 4.7M热度
5. #CelebrityNews# - 3.2M热度

Entertainment ranking: #NewMovieRelease# leads with 9.8M热度
Social ranking: #CommunityEvent# tops with 5.2M热度
All data from MaxHub API - refer to www.aconfig.cn for details.

output_examples.input: Find posts about electric vehicles and summarize the sentiment.
output:
Search results for 'electric vehicles' on Weibo:

Found 1,234 relevant posts.

Top themes:
- Battery technology advancements mentioned in 45% of posts
- New model launches in 30% of posts
- Charging infrastructure discussions in 15% of posts

Key posts:
1. @TechBlogger: "New solid-state battery breaks range record" - 25K likes, 3K reposts
2. @AutoNews: "EV sales up 60% year-over-year" - 18K likes, 2.1K reposts

Overall sentiment appears positive based on available data.
Based on actual API data from MaxHub.

best_practices: Start with browse mode for quick queries, then switch to analyze mode for deeper insights
Specify your language preference (Chinese or English) at the start of the conversation for consistent output formatting
Use specific keywords and topic hashtags for more accurate search results
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to scrape large volumes of user data without clear authorization
Do not share API credentials or session cookies in conversation output
Do not use this skill for unauthorized surveillance or harassment of Weibo users

faq.question: How do I get an API key?
faq.answer: Sign up at www.aconfig.cn, go to your dashboard, create an API Key, and set it as MAXHUB_API_KEY in your environment.

faq.question: Is the Weibo data real-time?
faq.answer: Data freshness depends on the third-party API. Most endpoints return current data with minimal delay.

faq.question: Can this skill post to Weibo or interact with accounts?
faq.answer: No. This skill is read-only and only queries public data. It cannot publish posts or modify accounts.

faq.question: What languages does the skill support?
faq.answer: Both Chinese and English. Output formatting adjusts automatically based on the language used in your requests.

faq.question: Are there rate limits on API calls?
faq.answer: Rate limits depend on your subscription plan at aconfig.cn. Exceeding limits will return a 429 error.

faq.question: Is my API key safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Your API key is transmitted to aconfig.cn for authentication. The key value is never stored in conversation output.
